description: Author-owned Investment Banking source category catalog. This file reserves static category ids, labels, and preference hints for the explicit source setup flow. It does not inspect connectors, claim readiness, select routes, or create category-state.json. User-specific source preferences and source-of-truth pointers live in $CODEX_HOME/state/plugins/{marketplace_id}/{plugin_id}/user-context.md.

deal_materials.label: deal materials, VDR exports, and diligence documents

process_updates.label: process trackers, meeting notes, and internal updates

relationship_counterparty_context.label: relationship, buyer, lender, and counterparty context

market_data_public_sources.label: market data, public filings, ratings, and transaction benchmarks
